title: Community Moderation Update (2026-04-29)
body:
We have removed two high-severity bad actors from the community today: one for posting phishing links across multiple channels, and another for repeated targeted harassment against newcomers.

Reminder: Trusted members and core maintainers are exempt from automated sanctions, and all reports against them are manually reviewed by the moderation team. We have also cleared a false positive mass report against a core maintainer that was submitted as part of a brigading campaign.

If you see spam, harassment, or other rule violations, please report it using the built-in community report tools. We appreciate your help keeping our community safe and welcoming for everyone.
